content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Reviewed all changes across src/cli/project.rs, src/contexts/milestone_record/controller.rs, and tests/cli.rs. The implementation correctly: (1) calls `br update --status=in_progress` before project creation via `claim_bead_in_br`, (2) transitions to NeedsOperator on claim failure (preventing task creation), (3) records linked task_id via `sync_controller_task_claimed`, (4) handles three distinct failure modes (br claim failure, project creation failure, controller link failure) with appropriate NeedsOperator transitions and tracing warnings. The `same_state_context_error_details` relaxation for Claimed state is correctly scoped — only Claimed allows introducing a task_id during same-state sync. The sync_flush call after update ensures remote persistence. All 1582 tests pass including 6 new unit tests and updated integration test fixtures. No bugs, safety problems, or correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
